Legal

Terms of Use

使用条款  ·  Last updated: June 26, 2026

Effective: June 26, 2026

Please read these Terms of Use ("Terms") carefully before using the website located at www.zysteels.net (the "Site"), operated by 中粤铁网公司 / Zhongyue Steel Wire Group ("Zhongyue Steel", "we", "our", or "us").

By accessing or using this Site, submitting an inquiry, or doing business with us through any channel linked from this Site, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

Contents

  1. Definitions
  2. Acceptance & Eligibility
  3. Permitted Use of the Site
  4. Prohibited Conduct
  5. Product & Pricing Information
  6. Inquiries, Quotes & Orders
  7. Intellectual Property
  8. Third-Party Links & Services
  9. Disclaimer of Warranties
  10. Limitation of Liability
  11. Indemnification
  12. Governing Law & Dispute Resolution
  13. Changes to These Terms
  14. Severability & Entire Agreement
  15. Contact Us

1Definitions

"Site"The website at www.zysteels.net and all related subdomains, pages, and content.
"User" / "you"Any person or entity that accesses or uses the Site for any purpose.
"Content"All text, images, videos, specifications, data, branding, and other materials published on the Site.
"Services"Product inquiries, quotation requests, order placement, and any other business activity conducted through the Site or linked channels.
"Order"A confirmed commercial purchase agreement between you and Zhongyue Steel for the supply of steel products.
"Marks"The Zhongyue Steel name, logo, 中粤铁网公司 trade name, and all associated trademarks and service marks.

2Acceptance & Eligibility

By using the Site you represent that:

  • You are at least 18 years of age and have full legal capacity to enter into binding agreements.
  • If you are acting on behalf of a company or other legal entity, you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms.
  • Your use of the Site and any transaction you enter into will comply with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction.

If you do not meet these requirements, you may not access or use the Site.

3Permitted Use of the Site

You may use the Site solely for lawful, legitimate business purposes, including:

  • Browsing product specifications, certifications, and company information.
  • Submitting inquiries and requesting quotations for steel products.
  • Contacting our sales team by phone, email, or WhatsApp as listed on the Site.
  • Downloading publicly available technical documents (e.g., product datasheets) for internal evaluation purposes.

All other uses require our prior written consent.

4Prohibited Conduct

You agree not to:

  • Use the Site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable law or regulation.
  • Scrape, crawl, index, or systematically download Content from the Site using automated tools without our express written permission.
  • Copy, reproduce, republish, distribute, or commercially exploit any Content or Marks without prior written authorisation.
  • Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent information in any inquiry or contact form.
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the Site, its servers, or any connected system.
  • Transmit viruses, malware, or any code designed to disrupt, damage, or intercept any data or system.
  • Impersonate Zhongyue Steel, any employee, partner, or other person in connection with use of the Site.
  • Use the Site to send unsolicited commercial communications (spam) to any person.
  • Frame or mirror any part of the Site without our prior written consent.

We reserve the right to terminate or restrict access for any user we reasonably believe has violated this section.

5Product & Pricing Information

All product descriptions, specifications, dimensions, images, and technical data on the Site are provided for informational purposes only. While we make every effort to ensure accuracy, we make no guarantees that the Content is complete, current, or error-free.

  • Specifications: Product tolerances, wire diameters, mesh spacings, and material grades are indicative. Final confirmed specifications are set out in a signed purchase order or sales contract.
  • Pricing: No prices displayed on this Site constitute a binding offer. All prices are subject to change without notice and are confirmed only in a formal written quotation issued by our sales team.
  • Availability: Product availability and lead times shown on the Site are estimates only and do not constitute a guarantee of stock or delivery date.
  • Images: Product photographs and renderings are illustrative. Actual products may vary slightly in appearance from those depicted.
A binding sales contract is formed only upon Zhongyue Steel issuing a signed written sales confirmation or proforma invoice that you have accepted. Website content alone does not constitute an offer or contract.

6Inquiries, Quotes & Orders

When you submit an inquiry or quotation request through the Site:

  • You authorise us to contact you using the details you provide.
  • Quotations issued by our sales team are valid for the period stated in the quotation (typically 7–14 calendar days), after which prices may change.
  • An Order is binding only once both parties have signed a purchase order or sales contract and any required deposit has been received.
  • All Orders are subject to our separate Sales Terms & Conditions, which will be provided with your quotation. In the event of conflict between these Terms of Use and the Sales Terms & Conditions, the Sales Terms & Conditions prevail for transactional matters.
  • We reserve the right to decline any Order at our discretion, including for compliance or capacity reasons.

7Intellectual Property

All Content on the Site — including text, graphics, photographs, logos, icons, product designs, technical drawings, and software — is the property of Zhongyue Steel or its licensors and is protected by applicable copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to access and view the Site and its Content for your own internal business evaluation purposes only. This licence does not include the right to:

  • Modify, adapt, or create derivative works from any Content.
  • Use any Marks, trade names, or logos without our prior written consent.
  • Reproduce or distribute Content commercially or publicly.
  • Remove or alter any copyright, trademark, or proprietary notices.

Any feedback, suggestions, or ideas you submit to us become our property, and we may use them without restriction or compensation to you.

8Third-Party Links & Services

The Site may contain links to third-party websites, services, or resources (for example, WhatsApp, freight carrier portals, or certification bodies). These links are provided for your convenience only.

  • We do not control third-party sites and are not responsible for their content, privacy practices, or availability.
  • A link does not imply our endorsement or affiliation with the linked site or its operators.
  • You access third-party sites entirely at your own risk and should review their terms and privacy policies.

Our contact and inquiry forms are processed by Formspree. Your use of those forms is also subject to Formspree's Terms of Service. Our website is hosted on Cloudflare Pages, subject to Cloudflare's Terms of Service.

9Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SITE AND ALL CONTENT ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:

  • Implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.
  • Warranties that the Site will be uninterrupted, error-free, secure, or free of viruses or harmful components.
  • Warranties as to the accuracy, completeness, currency, or reliability of any Content.

Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion of implied warranties. In such jurisdictions, the above exclusions apply to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.

10Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL ZHONGYUE STEEL, ITS DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR SUPPLIERS BE LIABLE TO YOU FOR:

  • Any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
  • Loss of profits, revenue, goodwill, data, or business opportunities.
  • Damages arising from your reliance on any Content, product information, or pricing displayed on the Site.
  • Damages arising from unauthorised access to or alteration of your data or transmissions.
  • Any matter beyond our reasonable control.

Our total aggregate liability to you for any claim arising out of or related to these Terms or your use of the Site shall not exceed USD $100 (one hundred US dollars), or the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim, whichever is greater.

Nothing in these Terms limits liability that cannot be excluded by law, such as liability for fraud, personal injury caused by our negligence, or death.

11Indemnification

You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Zhongyue Steel and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, judgments, awards, losses, costs, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or relating to:

  • Your violation of these Terms.
  • Your use of the Site or any Content in a manner not authorised by these Terms.
  • Any false or misleading information you submit to us.
  • Your infringement of any third-party intellectual property, privacy, or other rights.

12Governing Law & Dispute Resolution

These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Cambodia, without regard to its conflict-of-law principles.

Any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or relating to these Terms, or the breach, termination, or validity thereof, shall be resolved as follows:

  1. Negotiation: The parties shall first attempt to resolve the dispute through good-faith negotiation for a period of 30 days after written notice of the dispute.
  2. Mediation: If negotiation fails, either party may refer the dispute to mediation under such rules as the parties may agree.
  3. Litigation: If mediation is unsuccessful or not agreed upon, disputes shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Phnom Penh, Cambodia.

Notwithstanding the above, Zhongyue Steel reserves the right to seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction to protect its intellectual property or confidential information.

13Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. When we make material changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

We encourage you to review these Terms periodically. If you do not agree with any updated Terms, you must stop using the Site.

14Severability & Entire Agreement

If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid, illegal, or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, that provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary to make it enforceable, and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any applicable Sales Terms & Conditions, constitute the entire agreement between you and Zhongyue Steel with respect to your use of the Site, and supersede all prior agreements, representations, and understandings.

Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not be deemed a waiver of that right or provision.

15Contact Us

If you have questions or concerns about these Terms, please contact us:

  • Company: 中粤铁网公司 / Zhongyue Steel Wire Group
  • Address: CJJG+HHH, Khum Trapeang Kong, Cambodia
  • Email: sales@zhongyuetiewang.com
  • Phone: +855 76 497 6187
  • WhatsApp: wa.me/855764976187
